visualizerParams.title: Recursive Bitwise Addition
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The provided code uses an iterative approach for bitwise addition. Refactor the `add` function to use a recursive approach instead of a `while` loop.

solution.explanation: The recursive version of bitwise addition provides a more functional programming approach. It handles the base case when the carry (`second`) is 0, and recursively calls itself with the partial sum and the shifted carry.
